description: The Hacker Wars is an eye-opening documentary that reveals the high-stakes world of hacking, cyberwarfare, and digital activism. From underground hacker groups to government cyber defense teams, the film uncovers the real battles being fought in cyberspace - the rise of hacktivism and cyber resistance movements, how hackers exploit vulnerabilities to challenge powerful institutions, the blurred line between cybercrime and cyber defense, and why cybersecurity has become a global arms race.
name: The Hacker Wars
title: The Hackers War | Full Documentary (Cybersecurity & Hacking) | LufSec
